'''Beekly Grimlok''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] saboteur who referred himself as "the best technological assassin of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]". He was disgruntled with his former employer, [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]], when he worked there because of the Yards' pro-[[Human/Legends|Human]] stance and their largest customer, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. When he was fired shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], he started stealing the Yards' plans for many structure and vehicle designs for his revenge. He also blew up the Yards' products.<ref name="CCW" />
